query:
SELECT 
  c.id as client_id,
  c.name,
  c.whatsappPhone,
  c.email,
  c.userId,
  c.createdAt,
  u.id as user_id,
  u.email as user_email
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.email = 'alvarorios79@hotmail.com'
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Alvaro%' AND c.userId IS NULL
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
